resources.string: It\'s time for your scheduled body scan.
It\'s time for your scheduled body scan.
Finish your body scan today to keep your progress on track.
Come back next %1$s for your next scheduled scan.
Get reminders to do your next body scan.
Enable notifications in system settings to receive scan reminders.
Enabled by default.\nYou can turn it off during the scan.
Your scanning suit provides the most accurate body measurements.
You can find the ID on your suit tag or packaging
Your scanning suit is successfully linked to your profile.
This will disconnect the suit from your profile.
Your progress and scan history\nwill stay saved.
For security reasons, enter your password to continue.
Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
Your body knows before you do
No saved scans yet. Complete a scan to see history.
No scans yet. Complete a scan to see your measurements here.
Color view needs two completed scans to compare.
Couldn\'t load color view for this comparison.
Physique Balance shows how your body is changing between scans.\nIt combines your scan results with activity, sleep, recovery, and weight trends to estimate your physique direction over time.
Shows the direction your physique is trending this week.\nA positive value means your trend is improving.
Shows how many days remain until your next scan.\nStay consistent to improve your trend.
Predicts your next Physique Score if your current trend continues.
Better sleep consistency often improves recovery.
Solid sleep score — your body got the recovery it needed last night.
Decent rest. Slightly longer or more consistent sleep would boost recovery.
Short or fragmented sleep detected. Prioritize a longer, steadier night to support recovery.
Arrows show change vs previous week.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.\n\nDuis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident.

Sed ut perspiciatis unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium doloremque laudantium, totam rem aperiam, eaque ipsa quae ab illo inventore veritatis et quasi architecto beatae vitae.\n\nNemo enim ipsam voluptatem quia voluptas sit aspernatur aut odit aut fugit.
Type your email and we\'ll send you a reset code.
We\'ve sent you a link to reset your password.
Please accept the Terms & Privacy Policy to continue
Session expired. Please sign in again.
No email address is linked to this account.
No Google account available on this device. Add one in system settings and try again.
Your profile could not be found.
Please enter a valid email address
No account found with this email
An account with this email already exists
Password must be at least 8 characters
This account has been disabled. Contact support
Too many attempts. Please try again later
Network error. Check your connection and try again
This sign-in method is not enabled
Understand your body through visual intelligence.
Sync sleep, recovery, and activity for insights.
Sign in to connect a wearable
Couldn\'t connect Health Connect. Make sure it\'s installed and try again.
Terra rejected the developer credentials. Check terra.dev.id / terra.api.key.
Terra session expired. Please try again.
Terra account user limit reached. Contact support.
No internet connection. Check your network and try again.
Health Connect isn\'t enabled for this app yet. Enable it in the Terra dashboard.
Couldn\'t start wearable connection. Please try again.
Couldn\'t save your connection. Please try again.
Received an invalid response from the connection service.
This helps personalize your results\nand progress tracking.
If you already have a suit, connect it now.\nYou can also do this later in Settings.
You can find the ID on your suit tag or packaging
Please review these care instructions before using your suit. This step is required to continue.
Proper care helps protect the suit markers and keeps future scans accurate.
I have read and understood these instructions

string-array.name: suit_care_instructions
string-array.item: Cold hand wash or gentle machine wash

resources.string: Please fill in your height, weight, and date of birth before starting a scan.
Your recovery remained stable this week.
Recovery reflects how ready your body is based on recent signals.
Recovery reflects how prepared your body is to restore, adapt, and perform based on recent signals.
Shows your overall readiness for the selected day.
Sleep, stress, activity load, and resting heart rate help explain your recovery state.
RMSSD and SDNN show how your nervous system is responding to recovery, stress, and activity.
Consistent recovery may support better sleep, stronger activity readiness, and improved body progress over time.
Activity progress shows how close you are to your daily steps goal.
2. What you see on this screen
Along with steps, we also show distance and active calories to give more context for your day.
Numbers can vary depending on which device tracked your activity and whether it was carried during the day.
Regular movement supports energy levels, recovery, and long-term health. Over time, it can also contribute to changes in body composition.
This week you walked more than last week.
This week you walked less than last week.
This week you walked about the same as last week.
Not enough data to compare with last week yet.
This month you walked more than last month.
This month you walked less than last month.
This month you walked about the same as last month.
Not enough data to compare with last month yet.
This year you walked more than last year.
This year you walked less than last year.
This year you walked about the same as last year.
Not enough data to compare with last year yet.
You’re not wearing the suit right now. Put it on to continue, or switch to Regular Scan.
Voice guidance plays automatically during scans
Place your phone at a 90° angle.
Keep your whole body in the frame
Keep arms slightly away from your body
Turn to Your Left Side, Feet Together.
Hold still while your body scan is being captured.
Follow these steps for the best results.
Place your phone correctly for the best scan.
Keep your full body in frame
Adjust the volume to hear the voice instructions
Place your phone at a 90° angle, facing you
Make sure your full body fits in the frame
Stand still and follow the voice commands
We’ll transform your scan into body intelligence
Available after your next scan — needs two scans to compare.
Couldn\'t load color analysis. Turn the switch off and on to try again.
Height is required for scanning. Please update your profile.
Weight is required for scanning. Please update your profile.
Gender is required for scanning. Please update your profile.
Date of birth is required for scanning. Please update your profile.
Scan timed out. Please try again.
Physique Drift shows your body composition, shape, and proportions.
Complete a body scan to see your physique score.
Your body composition looks balanced, and your waist shape is improving. Symmetry and proportions also support a strong physique drift.
Your physique is improving. Reducing body fat while preserving lean mass can move the score toward the athletic range.
Your score has room to improve. Focus on sustainable fat loss, lean mass, waist profile, and balanced proportions.
Complete a scan to see how body fat, lean mass, waist shape, and proportions affect your score.
Physique Drift shows your overall body shape on a 1-10 scale.
The main factor. Lower body fat can improve the score, but only within a healthy range.
More lean mass can support a stronger and more athletic body shape.
A smaller waist relative to height can improve the physique score.
Shoulder-to-waist ratio, symmetry, and overall shape help define the final result.

Body fat contributes 50%%, lean body 25%%, waist shape 15%%, and proportions 10%%. 8-10 means lean / athletic, 5-7 means average / improving, and below 5 suggests more room for body composition improvement.
Your body is aging more slowly than average.
Your body is aging at a normal rate.
Your body is aging faster than average.
Based on your latest synced data - %1$s
Connect a wearable and sync to see your aging trend.
Your body is aging slower than average. %1$s is helping the most.
Your body is aging at a normal rate. %1$s is the strongest signal.
Your body is aging faster than average. %1$s is adding the most load.
Sync your health data to see what\'s driving your aging pace.
Body Age shows how fast your body is aging compared to a normal aging rate.
A value below 1.0 means your body is aging slower than average. A value above 1.0 means faster aging.
Below 0.95 means slower aging.\n0.96–1.05 means normal aging.\nAbove 1.05 means faster aging.
High HRV, good sleep, strong VO2 Max, and good recovery help reduce aging load.
Poor sleep, high stress, high abdominal fat, poor recovery, and low activity can increase aging load.
Your result can change as your sleep, recovery, stress, activity, body fat, and fitness levels change.
Your Longevity score shows how well your body is aging based on key health signals.
Based on your latest synced data · %1$s
Your recovery and activity trends are improving, which may support better long-term health and body resilience.
Longevity shows how well your body is aging based on key health signals.
Shows recovery and nervous system balance. Higher is usually better.
Shows your heart rate at rest. Lower is usually better.
Good sleep supports recovery and long-term health.
Steps, workouts, and movement consistency support longevity.
Shows how ready your body is based on sleep, stress, activity load, heart rate, and HRV.
Shows body composition and abdominal fat trends.
Shows cardio fitness and how well your body uses oxygen.
Combines these signals into one healthy aging score.
Shows how daily physical and nervous system strain may affect recovery, resilience, and long-term health over time.
